strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React depth in recent product roles
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling) — a rare required skill
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, active open-source maintainer
concerns: No stated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Significant career time invested in DLang, a niche language with limited direct relevance
Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced; Java exposure appears limited and dated
response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ year requirement with modern TypeScript/Node/React work at recent Berlin companies, brings hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience that directly matches an unusual hard requirement, and demonstrates strong testing culture, cloud/container familiarity (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and database experience (MongoDB, MySQL). Gaps are framework-level (Nest.js, Vitest) rather than conceptual, and the secondary-language ask (Kotlin/Python) is only partially covered — both are learnable for someone with this polyglot background.
